services.title: Blocked Drains
services.body: Same-day drain clearing for blocked sinks, toilets and outdoor drains.

services.title: Hot Water Systems
services.body: Supply and install gas, electric and heat pump hot water systems.

services.title: Leak Repairs
services.body: Fast leak detection and repair — no damage, no mess.

services.title: Bathroom Renovations
services.body: Complete bathroom fit-outs from design to final fixture.

items.a: Yes — for most jobs we can be there the same day you call. Emergency callouts are available 24/7.
Fully licensed plumber and gasfitter, with full public liability insurance.
Always. You'll get a clear written quote before we start any work — no surprises.
We cover all suburbs across the ACT and surrounding NSW.

items.title: Upfront pricing
items.body: Fixed quotes before we start — no hidden charges, ever.

items.title: On time, every time
items.body: We respect your schedule and always call ahead if running late.

items.title: 5-star rated
items.body: Over 200 Google reviews from happy customers across the ACT.

items.title: 15+ years experience
items.body: Trusted by Canberra homeowners and businesses since 2009.

items.name: Michael Chen
items.bio: Licensed master plumber with 15 years experience across residential and commercial projects.

items.name: Sarah Williams
items.bio: Specialises in bathroom renovations and hot water system installations.

items.name: Tom Harris
items.bio: Third-year apprentice, passionate about quality workmanship.

items.title: 60-min response
items.body: We're on site within the hour for urgent callouts.

items.title: Answer every call
items.body: Real people answer 24/7 — no call centres, no voicemail.

items.title: Quote before we start
items.body: Fixed price agreed before any work begins.

specialOffer.heading: July special
specialOffer.body: Book a hot water service this month and get a free pressure check — valued at $120.

steps.title: Call or request online
steps.body: Tell us what's happening and we'll give you an upfront price.

steps.title: We arrive on time
steps.body: Our plumber arrives in a fully stocked van — ready to fix it first visit.

steps.title: Job done right
steps.body: We clean up after ourselves and follow up to make sure you're happy.

finance.heading: Flexible payment options
finance.body: We partner with leading finance providers so you can spread the cost of larger jobs.
